texto: In life, we go through unexpected challenges that arises in our journey in succeeding, do not let any negativity taint your life with any misleading directions. Let the rejoice of your journey be with you all times, with the power of your soul and heart can combat any obstacle with time and gradual patience
explicacao: Citação de Lisa Marie sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “In life, we go through unexpected challenges that arises in our journey in succeeding, do not let…” articula reflexao, life-lessons, journey em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como viagem e reflexao.
